perspectives.description: Julia's boss who has the authority to decide who is informed about the upcoming event. Their decision to exclude certain colleagues may be based on strategic considerations.
A colleague of Julia who is directly affected by the decision to withhold information about the event. They may feel excluded or unprepared if they are not informed.
An attendee of the event who is indirectly affected by whether Julia informs her colleagues. Their experience may be impacted by the level of preparation and involvement of the team.
